Test coverage status helper

Source: R/status.R
coverage_status.Rd

`coverage_status()` runs `covr::package_coverage()` against the package tests and returns a small summary that can be stored for docs or dashboards. Use `read_coverage_status()` to read previously saved results.

Usage

coverage_status(
  type = c("tests", "all"),
  path = ".",
  data_file = NULL,
  quiet = TRUE
)

Arguments

type

Coverage type, passed to `covr::package_coverage()`. Currently supports `tests` (the default) and `all`.

path

Path to the package root. Defaults to the current working directory.

data_file

Optional file path to write the status JSON (useful for documentation or pkgdown badges). When `NULL` no file is written.

quiet

Passed to `covr::package_coverage()` to control console output.

Value

A named list with `percent`, `type`, `timestamp`, `statements`, and `files`. Invisibly returns the same list when writing to disk.

On this page
